name: patchwright
description: Patchwright monitors a GitHub Project board and turns ready issue packets into draft PRs through Codex CLI workers.

scripts.check: node --check tools/codex-daemon/index.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/github.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/state.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/prompts.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/codex-runner.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/packet.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/dashboard.mjs && node --check tools/codex-daemon/public/app.js
